title: Drills
description: This mod adds a drill that mines stone instantly and mines ores fairly quickly. However, it only mines with the power of a stone pickaxe.
body:
Use the gallery or JEI for the recipes!!

This mod adds a new type of pickaxe called a drill. The drill mines extremely fast and breaks stone instantly. However, it only mines at the pickaxe level of a stone pickaxe. This mod is to make gathering stone blocks and clearing out areas underground easier.
